items.example: Today I review everything I learned this week.
Can you summarize the grammar rules we studied?
Everyone makes mistakes when learning a language.
Practice makes perfect.
I can see my progress after one week of study.
She feels more confident speaking English now.
His English is improving every day.
Understanding grammar helps you form correct sentences.
Write five sentences about your daily routine.
The structure of Present Simple is S + V(s/es).
We studied two tenses this week.
'Now' is a signal word for Present Continuous.
Know and want are stative verbs.
Always and never are frequency adverbs.
Describe your morning routine in English.
English is useful for daily life situations.
Try to apply new grammar rules in conversation.
Understanding context helps you choose the right tense.
Use a combination of both tenses in your paragraph.
Write a paragraph about your typical day.
She achieved her weekly learning goal.
My goal is to speak English fluently.
With practice, you will become fluent in English.
Consistent daily practice leads to fast improvement.
Learning a language takes time and effort.
